name: nexora-crm
description: Nexora AI CRM — Production system for Future Optima IT Solutions

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma generate
